title: pityrogramma ambigua
intro: Pityrogramma ambigua, also known as the Silver Palm or Rattlesnake Palm, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant's rhizome is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pityrogramma ambigua include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a sought-after herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Pityrogramma ambigua can be made by infusing the rhizome in water or using it in tea form, and it is also sometimes used in tincture or extract form.
